prompt_text:
### Demographics: 77-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Alzheimer's Disease
Mild Cognitive Impairment with early Dementia
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Major Depressive Disorder
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF (No); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~22.5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 81.4 kg; Height 179.7 cm; BMI 25.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 130/86 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.9%; 9 months ago 6.7%; 6 months ago 6.8%; 3 months ago 6.8%; current 7.3%), FPG (12 months ago 137mg/dL; 9 months ago 161mg/dL; 6 months ago 173mg/dL; 3 months ago 169mg/dL; current 147mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 80.3kg; 9 months ago 79.8kg; 6 months ago 79.7kg; 3 months ago 81.2kg; current 81.4kg), Height (12 months ago 179.7cm; 9 months ago 179.7cm; 6 months ago 179.7cm; 3 months ago 179.7cm; current 179.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 131mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 136mmHg; 3 months ago 134mmHg; current 130mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 90mmHg; 9 months ago 87mmHg; 6 months ago 89mmHg; 3 months ago 87mmHg; current 86mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 18U/L; 9 months ago 18U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 10U/L; current 13U/L), AST (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 22U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 12U/L; current 16U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 7.7mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 9.6mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 5.1mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 7.1mL/min/1.73m²; current 5mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 535mg/g; 9 months ago 397mg/g; 6 months ago 561mg/g; 3 months ago 537mg/g; current 422mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 94mg/dL; 9 months ago 92mg/dL; 6 months ago 88mg/dL; 3 months ago 94mg/dL; current 91mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 40mg/dL; 9 months ago 42mg/dL; 6 months ago 42mg/dL; 3 months ago 43mg/dL; current 41mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 119mg/dL; 9 months ago 115mg/dL; 6 months ago 114mg/dL; 3 months ago 103mg/dL; current 109mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.8g/dL; 3 months ago 11.1g/dL; current 10.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.48 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
